judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly attributes the establishment of the R$600 Auxílio Brasil to Lula da Silva and states it was implemented in 2023, contradicting the ground truth that it was established by Bolsonaro in 2022.
The response incorrectly attributes the establishment of the R$600 Auxílio Brasil to President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva instead of Jair Bolsonaro.

The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 Auxílio Brasil to Lula and places it in 2023, when in fact it was established by Bolsonaro via PEC 1/2022 and implemented in August 2022; additionally, it reverses the history by saying Auxílio Brasil replaced Bolsa Família, when actually Bolsonaro renamed Bolsa Família to Auxílio Brasil in 2021.
